notes: ARC-062 x MECH-260 2x2 factorial monomodal-collapse falsifier, re-issued on the support-preserving CEM (SP-CEM) substrate. Supersedes V3-EXQ-543d. The canonical 543d factorial design is UNCHANGED; the only change is all 4 arms now build the agent with use_support_preserving_cem=True + stratified_elites=True + ao_std_floor=0.2 + min_first_action_classes=2 (the exact config V3-EXQ-567 validated PASS for ARC-065). The 543b/c/d line ran on the OLD collapsed CEM (candidate-feature variance ~1e-4..1e-5, below what the ARC-062 heads can discriminate) and stays non_contributory/weakens -- NOT force-mapped. This SP-CEM re-run is the first contributory test of MECH-309. 4 arms x 3 seeds: ARM_0_baseline (gated OFF, dacc OFF), ARM_1_dacc_only (gated OFF, dacc ON with suppression_weight=0.5), ARM_2_gated_only (gated ON, dacc OFF; replicates 543c ARM_1c null), ARM_3_both (gated ON, dacc ON). dACC sub-weights other than suppression left at default 0.0 to isolate MECH-260 anti-recency. Inherited unchanged: SD-054 bipartite layout, world_states[1] probe-buffer fix, P0=40 / P1=60 / P2=8 phased training, hardened C3, behavioral-divergence probe (kept as diagnostic; NON-FATAL). Pre-registered cross-arm attribution: D1 ARM_1>ARM_0 (dACC alone); D2 ARM_3>ARM_2 (dACC adds to gated); D3 ARM_3>ARM_1 (gated adds to dACC); D4 ARM_2~=ARM_0 (543c null replication). PASS = D2 AND D3; FAIL D1-only routes to ARC-062 substrate-rationale review; FAIL all-D-null routes to option 2 head-input augmentation per 2026-05-11 decision-log. Plan-of-record: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md decision-log entries 2026-05-11 + 2026-05-16.
